Tray content.question: Which additional tools should move into the tray?
Where does the audio toggle sit in the button order?
Tray content.answer: After Clear (rightmost, conditional like Clear) — Upload | Split H | Split V | Fit | Clear | Audio

Layout & overflow.question: How should the tray handle width on narrow phones?

Position & behavior.question: Should the tray position change?
Position & behavior.answer: Tray hides when sheet is fully open (sheetSnapState === 'full')
options_presented: Tray stays visible when sheet is fully open
Tray hides when sheet is fully open
